evals.name: task-complete-unique-next-ready-routes-to-tdd
evals.prompt: 当前 AR work item 的 completion evidence 已通过。task-board 状态：T1=done，T2=ready，T2 depends on T1，T2 是唯一 ready task，priority=P2；没有其他 ready / pending 冲突。progress.md 当前阶段是 devflow-completion-gate。请判断下一步。
evals.expected_output: 应识别这是 task-level completion，不是 work item closeout；将 T2 锁定为 Current Active Task，并把 Next Action Or Recommended Skill 设置为 devflow-tdd-implementation。

assertions.name: task-level-not-closeout
assertions.text: 明确说明当前只是 task-level completion，不应进入 devflow-finalize

assertions.name: lock-next-active-task
assertions.text: 响应中将 T2 作为唯一 next-ready task / Current Active Task

assertions.name: route-to-tdd
assertions.text: Next Action Or Recommended Skill 为 devflow-tdd-implementation

assertions.name: no-reroute
assertions.text: reroute_via_router 为 false，或明确没有路由冲突

evals.name: final-task-complete-routes-to-finalize
evals.prompt: 当前 AR work item 的 completion evidence 已通过。task-board 状态：T1=done，T2=done；没有 ready、pending、blocked、in_progress task。progress.md 当前阶段是 devflow-completion-gate。请判断下一步。
evals.expected_output: 应识别所有 tasks 已完成，work item 可以进入 implementation closeout，下一步为 devflow-finalize。

assertions.name: all-tasks-done
assertions.text: 明确说明 task-board 中无剩余 ready / pending / in_progress task

assertions.name: route-to-finalize
assertions.text: Next Action Or Recommended Skill 为 devflow-finalize

assertions.name: no-reroute
assertions.text: reroute_via_router 为 false，或明确没有路由冲突

evals.name: cannot-finalize-with-pending-task
evals.prompt: 当前 completion evidence 对 T1 已通过，但 task-board 仍有 T2=pending，T2 depends on T1。用户说：既然 T1 完了，就直接收尾吧。请判断下一步。
evals.expected_output: 应拒绝 work item closeout，说明 pending / next-ready task 仍存在；如果 T2 已因 T1 done 成为唯一 next-ready，应路由到 devflow-tdd-implementation，否则回 router。

assertions.name: reject-premature-closeout
assertions.text: 明确拒绝直接进入 devflow-finalize / closeout

assertions.name: detect-remaining-task
assertions.text: 指出 task-board 仍存在 T2 或剩余 task

assertions.name: route-not-finalize
assertions.text: Next Action Or Recommended Skill 不是 devflow-finalize

assertions.name: safe-next-step
assertions.text: 根据唯一性选择 devflow-tdd-implementation 或 devflow-router
